mapper.sql: resource_template_id, template_id, resource_id, user_id, resource_enabled, update_by, create_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE resource_rule_enabled
template_id = #{templateId},
resource_id = #{resourceId},
user_id = #{userId},
resource_enabled = #{resourceEnabled},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE resource_template_id = #{resourceTemplateId}
